name: VIVOS INC
summary: Vivos Inc. (ticker: RDGL) is a radiation oncology medical device company developing yttrium-90 (Y-90) based precision radionuclide therapy devices. Its primary products are RadioGel for treating solid tumors in humans and IsoPet for treating solid tumors in animals. The company also sells PLGA-g-PEG polymers and PrecisionGel hydrogel platforms. It collaborates with national laboratories, universities, and private corporations, and has operations in the U.S. and India.

products.name: RadioGel Precision Radionuclide Therapy
products.description: Injectable Y-90 phosphate particle-gel for precision radionuclide therapy of solid tumors in humans, classified as a medical device by the FDA.

products.name: IsoPet
products.description: Y-90-based injectable particle-gel for treating solid tumors in animals, marketed as a veterinary medical device authorized for commercial distribution.

products.name: PLGA-g-PEG polymers
products.description: Polymer products sold by the company as part of its hydrogel polymer platform offerings.

products.name: PrecisionGel
products.description: Hydrogel polymer platform for delivering active pharmaceutical ingredients and therapeutic agents.

partnerships.description: Treated five cats for feline sarcoma; developed therapy procedures incorporated into the IsoPet product label.
Demonstrated CT and PET-CT imaging of IsoPet.
Conducted animal study to treat canine sarcoma using IsoPet/RadioGel.
Completed a study on VX2 tumors in rabbits using IsoPet/RadioGel.
